title: alyssum foliosum
intro: Alyssum foliosum, also known as Creeping Alyssum, is a perennial flowering plant belonging to the mustard family (Brassicaceae), characterized by its small white blooms and delicate foliage. Traditionally, Alyssum foliosum has been used in herbal medicine for its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties, which help to soothe respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. The health benefits of Alyssum foliosum include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, promote better sleep, and support the immune system. Alyssum foliosum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often combined with other herbs in herbal blends to enhance its medicinal properties.
